title: Frontend: Form View Navigation and Section Rendering
description: Implement the core form view navigation component for the frontend. This component handles sequential form/section presentation across all three UIs (patient, hcp, admin). Includes: Sequential section navigation (one section at a time, next/previous controls), Question renderers for all types (multi-select, select-one, free-text, range), Section summary component showing completed answers with reopen capability, Clear visual separation of forms and sections, Incomplete section indicator with visual cues, One-section-at-a-time enforcement (closing current opens summary), Localization support via form definition translations, Progress tracking across multiple forms in a form response group, and WCAG 2.2 compliant keyboard navigation and screen reader support. Implements REQ-19 (Sequential Form Navigation) and REQ-14/REQ-15/REQ-16/REQ-17 (accessibility requirements).
